title: Claude Mythos is FINALLY here (Fable 5)
summary: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, a Mythos class model that achieves top performance on benchmarks including SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code. The model demonstrates capabilities in memory handling, vision tasks, website testing, fullstack applications, and CAD demonstrations.
writeup: Better Stack covers Anthropic's release of Claude Fable 5, a Mythos class model positioned around long context and computer vision. The video reports top benchmark results on SWE Bench Pro and Frontier Code, then walks through capabilities in memory handling, vision tasks, website testing, fullstack application building, and CAD demonstrations. The takeaway is a new Mythos tier model framed primarily around coding benchmarks and applied agentic and visual workloads.
